description: Synthetic device_id cookie values illustrating the byte-identical persistent_id pattern across three fully isolated browser contexts. The persistent_id 'Zx7Qp2Lm9Kd4Rt1Vb8N' is identical across two distinct domains and three independent contexts -- the signature of server-side re-identification. Values are fabricated for testing, not captured from any real site.
method: Three Playwright BrowserContext instances, each fresh (no shared cookies, storage, or in-memory state). Identity cookies captured after clicking the reject-equivalent on each site's consent banner.
